benefits.description: Takes the dread and overwhelm away enough to get out of house and head; life changing combined with CBT and mindfulness
Helps with repetitive negative thoughts when other tools haven't touched them

protocol_notes: Uses waxy troches from Joyous telehealth (15mg to 120mg range, dosed up to sweet spot). Bites pieces off throughout the day and places between cheek and gums. Saves a chunk for daily 1hr meditations/journaling/CBT sessions. Not a peptide but shared personal experience.
